summary: Iteration 27: Tested i18n toggle and Add Step modal. All major i18n features working correctly. Add Step modal opens with content visible (bug fix verified). Language toggle switches between DE/EN on all pages. Found minor issue: StepDialog has some hardcoded German labels that don't translate to English.

ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded German labels in Basic section don't translate to English: 'Titel', 'Beschreibung', 'Reihenfolge', 'Aktiv', 'Überspringbar', 'Überspringen-Text', 'Abbrechen', 'Aktualisieren', 'Erstellen'

passed_tests: ADD STEP MODAL: Admin clicks 'Add Step', modal opens with Grunddaten form visible (Title, Description, Order, Type fields) - BUG FIX VERIFIED
ADD STEP MODAL: Type dropdown shows 5 options (Form, Partner Selection, Partner Multi-Selection, Milestone, Display)
ADD STEP MODAL: Section tabs visible (Grunddaten/Basic, Felder/Fields, Anforderungen/Requirements, Mappings, Bedingungen/Conditions, Benachrichtigungen/Notifications)
I18N TOGGLE: Admin dashboard shows language toggle in header (DE/EN button with globe icon)
I18N GERMAN: With DE selected, tabs show: Dashboard, Benutzer, Schritte, Partner, CMS, Audit-Protokoll, Einstellungen
I18N ENGLISH: Toggle to EN, tabs show: Dashboard, Users, Steps, Partners, CMS, Audit Log, Settings
I18N STEP EDITOR: Open step editor in DE mode, section tabs show: Grunddaten, Felder, Anforderungen, Mappings, Bedingungen, Benachrichtigungen
I18N STEP EDITOR: Toggle to EN, section tabs show: Basic, Fields, Requirements, Mappings, Conditions, Notifications
I18N USER DASHBOARD: Login as demo user, language toggle works, 'Willkommen' (DE) / 'Welcome' (EN)
I18N USER DASHBOARD: 'Voraussichtlicher Abschluss' badge visible in German mode
I18N USER DASHBOARD: 'Fortschritt speichern' / 'Save Progress' button translates correctly
I18N USER DASHBOARD: 'Abschließen & Weiter' / 'Complete & Continue' button translates correctly
I18N USER DASHBOARD: Notification preferences panel shows 'Benachrichtigungseinstellungen' in German
I18N PARTNER DASHBOARD: Login as partner, tabs show 'Meine Nutzer', 'Andere Nutzer', 'Profil' in German
I18N PARTNER DASHBOARD: Toggle to EN, tabs show 'My Users', 'Other Users', 'Profile'
I18N PARTNER FILTERS: In DE: 'Fachgebiet', 'Prognose von', 'Prognose bis' visible
I18N PARTNER FILTERS: In EN: 'Specialty', 'Forecast from', 'Forecast to' visible
I18N CREATE USER: Open dialog in DE: 'Benutzer anlegen', 'Passwort', 'Rolle', 'Erstellen' visible
I18N CREATE USER: In EN: 'Create User', 'Password', 'Role', 'Create' visible
I18N SETTINGS TAB: In DE: 'Einstellungen', 'Seiteneinstellungen', 'Logo-Konfiguration', 'Einstellungen speichern' visible
I18N SETTINGS TAB: In EN: 'Settings', 'Site Settings', 'Logo Configuration', 'Save Settings' visible
action_items: FIX: StepDialog hardcoded German labels - Replace 'Titel' with {t('step_title')}, 'Beschreibung' with {t('step_description')}, 'Reihenfolge' with {t('step_order')}, 'Aktiv' with {t('step_active')}, 'Überspringbar' with {t('step_skippable')}, 'Überspringen-Text' with {t('step_skip_label')}, 'Abbrechen' with {t('cancel')}, 'Aktualisieren'/'Erstellen' with {t('save')}/{t('step_create')} in AdminDashboard.js lines 1425-1433, 1637-1638
critical_code_review_comments: StepDialog component in AdminDashboard.js has hardcoded German labels in the Basic section that should use t() translation function for consistency with the rest of the app

success_rate.frontend: 95% (21/22 tests passed, 1 minor i18n issue in StepDialog)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, Demo User: demo@example.com / Demo123!, Partner: partner@example.com / Partner123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 complete. i18n toggle working on all pages (Admin, User, Partner dashboards). Add Step modal bug fixed - content now visible. Minor issue: StepDialog has hardcoded German labels in Basic section (Titel, Beschreibung, Reihenfolge, Aktiv, Überspringbar) that don't translate to English. All other i18n translations working correctly with 150+ translation keys in LanguageContext.js.
